name: spectron
description: Connect Codex to a Spectron MCP endpoint

interface.shortDescription: Connect Codex to a Spectron MCP endpoint.
interface.longDescription: Use the Spectron plugin to connect Codex to the MCP server exposed by your Spectron instance. Includes a bundled Codex MCP descriptor for the spectron server. The user-provided instance URL is the source of truth and should point to an endpoint such as https://<instance>/mcp.
